name: game-app
description: The deployed game app — a Vite + React PWA shell around the engine in ../src.

scripts.dev: npm run assets && npm run extract && vite
scripts.build: npm run assets && npm run extract && vite build && node scripts/generate-seo.mjs
scripts.assets: node scripts/generate-assets.mjs && node scripts/generate-enemies.mjs && node scripts/generate-levels.mjs && node scripts/generate-bot-tuning.mjs
scripts.levels: node scripts/generate-enemies.mjs && node scripts/generate-levels.mjs && node scripts/generate-bot-tuning.mjs
